title: Quick Search Shortcut from Monday Docs (Keyboard Shortcut CTRL+B)

posts.author: Danmir (Daniel Mirwis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Not a major issue but disruptive to my workflow:

I often use the Quick Search Feature to navigate between boards due to the number of workspaces & boards that we have.

I usually utilise the keyboard shortcut CTRL+B to open the Quick Search Dialog.

CTRL+B doesn’t function when the current ‘board’ open is a Monday doc (which I am using more and more frequently) so I need to open the quick search feature manually.

Would love the functionality to work from any page to any page in Monday.

posts.author: aza.rose (Aza Rose)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love to see this implemented as our docs are getting longer and longer
